untranslatable_reason: Gap detection requires explicit gap identification logic (prev_close vs open discontinuity) and gap-cause analysis (news-driven vs organic), neither of which can be directly expressed using the allowed indicators and operators. The signal requires domain-specific gap classification that is not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated gap conditions using: small true_range relative to ATR (indicating gap size relative to recent volatility), low volume (volume below 20-day historical average), and directional price movement (close vs prev_close for gap direction). Gap-fill exits modeled as price reversing through the gap origin (prev_high/prev_low). However, this is a heuristic approximation—proper gap trading requires explicit gap detection and news/earnings filtering unavailable in the allowed indicator set.
